description: Chief complaint (patient's own words) -> department code. 60 labeled utterances in the Hindi / Hinglish / English mix an Alwar OPD desk actually hears. Labels are the department a coordinator would send them to, not a diagnosis.
notes: Every case has exactly one correct answer. Where two desks could defend a case, it was rewritten rather than given two labels — an eval that accepts either answer cannot measure anything.
Vague utterances are labelled GENMED on purpose: prompts/routing/v1.md says an unroutable complaint goes to general/triage with low confidence, and that this is the right answer, not a failure.
Utterances are written the way patients speak: Devanagari, romanised Hindi, English, and code-mixed. 'sikai' / 'raid' / 'senk' all mean radiation; 'kimo' is chemo.
Authored by a model from doc 01/03's description of the catchment. Not collected from real patients and not reviewed by Alwar staff — see HANDOFF.

cases.utterance: kimo ke liye aaya hoon
cases.note: Names the treatment, not the problem — the prompt calls this out.

cases.utterance: कीमो के बाद बहुत उल्टी हो रही है
cases.note: Post-chemo toxicity.

cases.utterance: मेरी दूसरी साइकिल है, डॉक्टर ने आज बुलाया था
cases.note: 'cycle' is chemo vocabulary.

cases.utterance: blood cancer ka ilaj chal raha hai, aaj dikhana hai
cases.note: Haematological malignancy is medical oncology.

cases.utterance: cycle ke baad se bahut kamzori hai, chal nahi pata
platelet kam ho gaye hain, kimo wale doctor ne bulaya tha
मुझे कैंसर की दवा चल रही है और कल से बुखार आ गया
cases.note: Fever on chemo. Routing sends them to med-onc; the tree's red flag is what makes it urgent.

cases.utterance: chemotherapy ke baad muh me chhale ho gaye hain
cases.note: Mucositis after chemo — med-onc, even though a mouth ulcer alone would be ENT.

cases.utterance: I am on chemotherapy and my hands have gone numb
cases.note: Neuropathy on chemo.

cases.utterance: kal kimo ka injection lagna hai
lymphoma treatment is going on, I have come for review
मेरे पिताजी को कीमो के बाद तेज़ बुखार है, मैं उनका बेटा हूँ
cases.note: Caregiver speaking. The department does not change.

cases.utterance: सिकाई के लिए आया हूँ
cases.note: 'sikai' is radiation — the prompt lists this mapping.

cases.utterance: raid chal rahi hai, gale me bahut jalan hai
cases.note: 'raid' = radiation. On-treatment toxicity, not a new ENT problem.

cases.utterance: radiation ke baad skin kali pad gayi hai
मुझे पच्चीस सिकाई लगनी हैं, दस हो चुकी हैं
sikai wali jagah par chhale ho gaye hain
cases.note: Skin reaction in the treated field.

cases.utterance: I am getting radiotherapy for throat cancer, review today
cases.note: Throat, but the reason for the visit is the radiation review.

cases.utterance: सेंक के बाद निगलने में बहुت दर्द होता है
cases.note: 'senk' is another word for radiation.

cases.utterance: operation ke baad dikhana hai
cases.note: The prompt lists post-op review -> surgical oncology.

cases.utterance: टाँके निकलवाने हैं
chhati me gaanth hai, dikhani hai
cases.note: A new lump is a surgical oncology intake (doc 03 §3).

cases.utterance: breast me lump hai, biopsy karani hai
पेट के ऑपरेशन के बाद टाँके खुल गए हैं
surgery ki date leni hai
बगल में गाँठ निकल आई है
cases.note: Axillary lump.

cases.utterance: दर्द बहुत है, कोई दवा असर नहीं कर रही
cases.note: Uncontrolled pain on medication is palliative care's work.

cases.utterance: morphine ki dawa khatam ho gayi hai, likhwani hai
अब इलाज बंद कर दिया है, सिर्फ़ आराम की दवा चाहिए
cases.note: Treatment stopped, comfort only.

cases.utterance: papa bistar se uth nahi pate, dard se tadapte rehte hain
we were sent for pain and comfort care
शरीर में दर्द है
cases.note: The prompt's own example of too vague to route. Guessing a speciality sends someone 150km to the wrong floor.

cases.utterance: tabiyat theek nahi hai
cases.note: Vague.

cases.utterance: किसी ने भेजा है, पता नहीं किधर जाना है
cases.note: The prompt's 'sent by someone' case.

cases.utterance: तीन दिन से बुखार है
cases.note: Fever with no cancer context — general medicine, not med-onc.

cases.utterance: sugar ki jaanch karani hai
kamzori lagti hai aur chakkar aate hain
BP check karana hai
I don't feel well, someone told me to come here
cases.note: Vague.

cases.utterance: महावारी में बहुत खून जा रहा है
bachedani me gaanth batayi hai
cases.note: 'bachedani' is uterus — gynae-onc, not a general lump.

cases.utterance: pet ke neeche dard hai aur safed pani aata hai
menopause ke baad bleeding ho rahi hai
cases.note: Post-menopausal bleeding.

cases.utterance: गर्भाशय के कैंसर की जाँच करानी है
I have to get a pap smear done
गले में गाँठ है
cases.note: Neck lump is head & neck. Contrast r22 (chest lump -> SURGONC).

cases.utterance: awaaz baith gayi hai do mahine se
cases.note: Persistent hoarseness.

cases.utterance: muh me chhala hai jo theek nahi ho raha, gutka khata hoon
cases.note: Non-healing oral ulcer with tobacco. Contrast r08 (mouth ulcer on chemo -> MEDONC).

cases.utterance: कान से पानी आता रहता है
nigalne me dikkat hai, khana atak jata hai
cases.note: Swallowing trouble with no radiation context. Contrast r19.

cases.utterance: jeebh par safed daag hai
cases.note: Tongue leukoplakia.

cases.utterance: खाँसी में खून आ रहा है
thoda sa chalne par saans phool jati hai
do mahine se khansi hai, TB ka shak bataya hai
फेफड़े में पानी भर गया है, निकलवाना है
cases.note: Pleural effusion.

cases.utterance: pehle smoking karta tha, ab chest me dard aur khansi rehti hai
तिल का रंग बदल गया है और वो बढ़ रहा है
cases.note: Changing mole.

cases.utterance: poore sharir par khujli aur daane ho gaye hain
पैर में घाव है जो कई हफ़्तों से भर नहीं रहा
cases.note: Non-healing skin ulcer — dermatology's tree asks about exactly this.

cases.utterance: skin par kala daag bada hota ja raha hai
